item.dc:creator: CanWeStopTalkingNow

item.title: Imgurian cookbook? Let's make homemade water
item.description: I was so excited to see Imgur dedicate a day to cooking and recipes! If you've seen my posts, you know I love to cook. I wanted to come up with a recipe I haven't shared before. This is my family's homemade water recipe (with a few tweaks I've made over the years). It's pretty simple and forgiving if you miss a step. For example the flour pinch isn't necessary but you might want to strain it through a french press if you skip it. I did this off camera because I ran out of time. Anyways, enjoy! Ingredients: 3 ice cubes Water 1/4 cup or 59ml of water Recipe: Start by adding 2 ice cubes to a mortar and pestle and grinding it up into a slushy. Bring a sauce pan to high heat and add in your slushy water. Once it heats up you're going to get a water consistency. Cut the heat and let it cool down. Finely chop up 1 ice cube. Add your ice cube into a blender and pulse for 30 seconds. Then take the water you sauteed earlier and add it to the blender. Take that mixture and add it to a cocktail shaker. Shaken not stirred. It's going to be cold so I always wrap a towel around it. Now this next step is optional but I like to add a pinch of flour. It just gives it that je ne sais quoi. Off camera I put it through a french press, unfortunately it didn't fit into the video timeframe. Once it's strained pour it into a bowl. I tried to mix it by hand but my dainty little girl arms couldn't handle it so I had to bust out my KitchenAid. Mix on low for 2-3 minutes. Next you're going to take ¼ cup or 59ml of that water and sprinkle it onto your cutting board. Careful not to spill! Take a rolling pin and roll it until it's about 0.0001mm thin. Then using a pipette suck up the water and pour into a glass of your choice. You know the next part. Enjoy! Let me know if you have any questions about measurements and what not. How do you like to make water?
item.dc:creator: ItsMoni

item.dc:creator: labellavita1985

item.title: I had a Dad win
item.description: My son is way into obscure podcasts. Really wanted to see "welcome to Nightvale" live, but none of his friends are into it so over the last 9 months I listened to every episode. He's so excited and it's wonderful sharing all the inside jokes / obscure references with him. Feels like a big Dad win and I wanted to share!

item.dc:creator: Lanhdanan

item.title: A different gun culture.
item.description: Many Americans seem to think that we hate guns over here whenever we want to voice an opinion about mass shootings and gun laws in the US but the reality is, we dont mind guns what so ever, the big difference is the culture around them, for the majority of nordic gun owners they are simply tools used for hunting, that you then lock away in your safe whenever they are not used, you dont keep them under the bed for home defense and such. About the numbers, i dont know about Norway and Finland but in Sweden as a hunter you are allowed 4 licenses but you can apply for more, in which case you have to explain the need for them, like you want to get a second 308 rifle but in a lighter configuration for a different hunting style. And while we are not as armed as the Americans, our avarage calibers are bigger (wierd flex?) /s Having strict gun laws dosnt mean big gov is gonna take your guns, it just means it will put more demands on you to be a safe gun owner (seriously you guys have statistics for toddler shootings ffs) And no i dont think AR's should be banned, but the requirements for owning one should be a lot higher, it isnt something a temperamental 18yr should be able to buy.

item.title: Some suspicious memes v55
item.description:
“Online with anyone”absolutely slayed me I can’t (also how do you score competitive sex? If it’s not by # of female orgasms with a lesbian championship final round I quit)
“Is you finish or is you done” is my new catch phrase
I grew up in Texas, you can’t just leave your kid in the car for over an hour nowadays or you’d go to jail but noooo back then it was apparently fine
This is how my brain works
My ship has sailed!
Sappho the lizard is doing well thanks for asking
Has there ever been a queer person named Karen tho
Ok I was a vegetarian for a LONG time but this shit is hilarious. First off WHY ARE THEY IN THIS ORDER? It would make sooooo much more sense to mix them up. And second why are ducks more food than cows? And why is that other kind of cow more food than a different cow? Why are bassets less food than labs????? And where are the fish??? I have so many questions
Im sure this was meant for the post 9/11 terrorists but I’m applying it to the domestic Jan 6 terrorists
I love this show
*sigh*. He ate SEVERAL handfuls of dirt but zero food.
Is it because of the rat tail? I bet it’s because of the rat tail. Idk if you shaved it man you never live that shit down
The first lesson literally everyone needs to know is: mind your own damn business about what other people look like. They might be healthy and look overweight, they might be disabled and doing their best, they might be recovering from an eating disorder, they might just really like food - it doesn’t matter! It does not affect you! The second lesson is: if you have to develop an eating disorder to change your body type, you are not meant to have that body type. Full stop. Let your body do its thing. It is your only one and we have a very short time to enjoy this life.
It me
That’ll show him
Whatever that is, I do not want it.
I miss the game of thrones pre season 8 memes (the show can eat a dick)
VENGEANCE
Yeah basically
They’re not wrong
Sorry for shitty quality but this made me laugh so hard. Questionable Content webcomic
This would be me but with stuffed animals
If this one doesn’t turn out I will cry
“No, the…uh…BEST book?” “Oh, their favorite bit is when the Silmarils are—“ “Never mind.”
Blue eyes are boring as shit. Ask me how I know. Stop romanticizing blonde hair and blue eyes were good we’ve had our time
*static noise* I COME FROM A LAND DOWN UNDA *static noise* TOSS A COINNNN TO YOUR WITCHER *static noise* JEEFFREY, JEFFREY BEZOS
This movie is incredible and I want to watch it again now (boondock saints)
For that price it better blow me too
I mean none of that is wrong
I love him
QUANTUM OAT
What, like it’s hard?
I want to see that fight. Link is a gremlin.
Please Lord send me a man who uses this as a pick up line and then presents me with a banana python. Just once. I beg of you. Men have no fucking game I swear to god
That is a wise kid
He’s having an existential crisis is what he’s having
Both
Don’t worry just the unvaccinated ones, I put polio in the water, no don’t thank me im no hero I just like cheap Halloween decorations
More people should be scared of me but im just too darn blonde
I don’t care I had to take a screenshot THE EGG ISNT BROKEN HOW HE DOIN THAT
How rude of you to call me out like this Sylvia
Tortoise tax! (Right) He just kinda roams around the aquarium and naps in random places. He has a balloon on his shell.

I feel like she's on to something

Aww, such cute little birbs
He does not look happy about it
Happy Tuesday guys!
